candidates.why: Base revenue line; appears to be the primary revenue descriptor for recent years.
Component of total revenue related to Hafnia and time-charter vessels; useful if main revenue line label changes.
Component of total revenue from external vessels; complements other revenue components.
Explicit total of all revenue components and matches sum of component rows; best single top-line measure.
Finance income, not operating revenue; should not be used as REVT.
Likely subtotal of financial income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the year
candidates.why: Includes net income and OCI; not a revenue measure.

candidates.row_label: Sales and leaseback liabilities (accounted for as financing transaction)
candidates.why: Liability; unrelated to revenue.
Liability; represents revenue received but not yet recognized, not the revenue line itself.

variables.notes: Use Total Revenue as primary REVT, with other revenue labels as fallbacks in case of label changes across years.

candidates.why: Direct operating costs of vessels; clearly part of cost of services / COGS for a shipping company.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Classified within SG&A; overhead rather than direct COGS.
Too generic and includes non-COGS items; multiple rows with this label; ambiguous for pure COGS mapping.
Direct voyage-related costs (fuel, port charges, etc.); core COGS component.

candidates.row_label: Voyage expenses (Hafnia vessels and TC vessels)
candidates.why: Component of voyage expenses for owned/TC vessels; detailed COGS component.

candidates.row_label: Voyage expenses (External vessels in disponent-owner pools)
candidates.why: Component of voyage expenses for external vessels; detailed COGS component.
Direct technical management cost of vessels; operating cost consistent with COGS.
Cost of chartered-in vessels; direct cost to generate revenue; part of COGS.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Compensation classified in SG&A, not COGS.
Net operating subtotal, not a pure COGS component.
Financing, not operating cost of sales.
Balance sheet asset; not an income statement cost line.
Balance sheet inventory; not an expense line.
Liability for various expenses, not the COGS line itself.

final_choice.row_label: Voyage expenses (Hafnia vessels and TC vessels)
Voyage expenses (External vessels in disponent-owner pools)

variables.notes: Selected direct operating cost components (vessel, voyage, technical management, and charter hire). Used detailed voyage expense components rather than the aggregate ‘Voyage expenses’ subtotal to follow the preference for components over totals.

candidates.why: Operational COGS-type expense rather than overhead SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly identified as SG&A labor costs; a core SG&A component.
Personnel overhead; typically part of SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Clearly SG&A stock-based compensation; classic SG&A component.
Contra expense/income, not an SG&A expense component.

final_choice.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Includes explicit SG&A labor and stock-based compensation lines plus generic wages/salaries as overhead components. Excludes vessel operating expenses (COGS) and ‘Other operating income’ (income, not expense).
No research and development-related line items appear in the provided Income Statement or Balance Sheet previews. Treat XRD as structurally absent (0).

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line item; best representation of gross interest cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; a component of total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Loss arising on interest rate cap designated as a cash flow hedge
candidates.why: Derivative loss, not pure interest expense, though related to financing.
Represents profit allocation, unrelated to interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; alternative label for lease interest.
Equity line, not interest expense.
Equity line, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Primary XINT is ‘Interest expense’. Included ‘Interest expense - Balancing value’ and both financial lease interest labels as fallbacks for years where labels or presentation may differ. Excluded hedge-related losses and equity items. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Interest expense - Balancing value

candidates.row_label: Equity investments at FVOCI - net change in fair value
candidates.why: OCI item, not total book equity.
Equity attributable to shareholders; best proxy for BE excluding non-controlling interests.
Total equity including any non-controlling interests; slightly less specific than ‘Total shareholders equity’.
Represents total assets/liabilities+equity; not an equity subtotal.

variables.notes: Chose ‘Total shareholders equity’ as book equity attributable to owners, which appropriately excludes non-controlling interests (mapped separately to MIB).

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit to non-controlling interests; valid indicator of NCI but not the balance sheet stock.
Balance sheet line for minority interest; primary MIB measure.
Alternative label for non-controlling interests; backup if primary NCI line changes.
Income statement minority interest allocation; secondary indicator.

variables.notes: Primary MIB source is the balance sheet ‘Non-controlling interests’, with ‘Minority Interest’ as an alternative label. Income statement NCI lines are included as additional fallbacks for years where balance sheet presentation may differ.
